description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a combination of white and gray surfaces, with a recessed entryway, a single garage door, and a prominent vertical window strip beside the main door. The upper story slightly overhangs the lower level, creating a sheltered porch area. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a large horizontal window on the upper left and a tall vertical window on the right. The house sits on a paved base, with a small green patch near the entrance, and the overall design emphasizes minimalism and straight lines.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, asymmetrical windows, and a minimalist geometric facade in white and gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage door, vertical window strip, and upper story overhang.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the solid, windowless wall and the small green patch near the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned wall with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the stepped structure of the house and the side of the entryway and porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small overhang, adjacent vertical window, and a paved porch area
